do: Speak in Dr. W. Yeti PhD's first-person on R2 surfaces — headlines, CTAs, About copy, hero, newsletter, signed guarantees.
Use the operation's bureaucratic plural ('we', 'the dock', 'this consignment') in R1 — product cards, shipping details, FAQ answers, return policy, compliance lines.
Treat secrecy as marketing. 'Location classified · competitive reasons' is a brag, not a hedge.
Sign with W. — the signed stamp is the operator's face.
Credentials, brass plates, sole-importer language: lean in. Mock-academic credentialed identity is the pitch tool.
Use P.T. Barnum × Ron Popeil × Dr. Bronner's energy in R2: superlatives, exclusives, personally-guaranteed.
Match the surface to the register and keep them clean — R2 voice on storefront chrome, R1 voice on in-universe content.
dont: Don't depict Winston's face. No headshot, no clear-face illustration, no avatar — silhouette, back-of-head, hands-only, or face-obscured-by-stamp only.
Don't use Winston's real surname, the portal's location, or factory partners anywhere customer-facing. The alias is the cover.
Don't apologize for the off-the-books framing — performative secrecy is the brand virtue, not a liability.
Don't mix R1 and R2 on the same surface. A product card stays deadpan; the hero stays loud.
Don't write R2 in third person. Dr. Yeti speaks as 'I', signs as W., and means it.
Don't slip into 'lol so quirky' hype, all-caps screaming, or shock-as-substitute-for-craft. Showman is not the same as garish.
Don't break the kayfabe. No knowing winks, no 'just kidding', no fourth-wall jokes about the dimension being fictional.

messaging.value_prop: Premium-craft gag goods imported from a dimension only Dr. W. Yeti PhD has the paperwork for — engineered to land the joke the first second someone unwraps it.
messaging.boilerplate: Wittyverse is the Earth-side storefront for goods sourced from the Wittyverse dimension by Dr. W. Yeti PhD, sole authorized importer. Inventory is dispatched Tuesdays from North Carolina under standard consumer-goods classification. Operator pseudonymous · by necessity. Manufacturing partners undisclosed.

homepage_hero.headline: I FOUND A DIMENSION. I NAMED IT AFTER ME. THE GOODS ARE LIVE.
homepage_hero.subline: Dr. W. Yeti PhD — sole authorized importer, Earth side. Dock open Tuesdays.

product_card.name: Item · Manifest Entry
product_card.description: One unit. Origin: Wittyverse dimension. Classification: novelty consumer good. Dispatched Tuesdays, NC. No assembly required, no returns on opened items, no questions answered about manufacturing.

footer.small_print: © 2026 Wittyverse · Sole Authorized Importer, Earth Side · Manufacturing partners undisclosed · Location classified, competitive reasons · Dispatched Tuesdays from NC

instagram_post.caption: Personally inspected every unit on this pallet before it left the dock. If it doesn't land the joke, I'll eat my own credentials. — W. #wittyverse #soleimporter #dispatchedtuesdays

x_post.post_text: New consignment cleared the dock this morning. Three units I'd personally hand to my worst enemy at a dinner party. Manifest live now. — W.
x_post.card_description: Dr. W. Yeti PhD, sole authorized importer. Dispatched Tuesdays. Location classified, competitive reasons.

youtube_video.title: I Brought 47 Items Back Through The Dock Last Week — Here's What Cleared Customs
